name: pm-skills-marketplace
description: Product Management skills for AI agents

plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: 38 PM skills covering the full product lifecycle: 25 phase skills, 7 foundation skills (including the v2.11.0 Meeting Skills Family of 5 cross-cutting skills + lean-canvas + persona), and 6 utility skills. Includes templates, examples, workflows, thread-aligned samples, and lifecycle tools for creating, validating, and iterating skills. First release with a canonical skill-family contract pattern enforced by CI. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
plugins.author: product-on-purpose
